prompt: Use web search to find the current Y Combinator batch acceptance rate. Report the most recent statistic with a source URL.

mock_result.response:
Y Combinator's acceptance rate has historically been around 1-2% of applicants. For the W24 batch, approximately 250 companies were accepted from over 27,000 applications — an acceptance rate of roughly 0.9%.

Source: https://www.ycombinator.com/blog/yc-w24-stats (YC official blog, accessed 2024)
